description: Vulnerability in the PeopleSoft Enterprise FIN Grants product of Oracle PeopleSoft (component: Grants).   The supported version that is affected is 9.2. Difficult to exploit vulnerability allows unauthenticated attacker with network access via HTTP to compromise PeopleSoft Enterprise FIN Grants.  Successful attacks of this vulnerability can result in  unauthorized update, insert or delete access to some of PeopleSoft Enterprise FIN Grants accessible data as well as  unauthorized read access to a subset of PeopleSoft Enterprise FIN Grants accessible data. CVSS 3.1 Base Score 4.8 (Confidentiality and Integrity impacts).  CVSS Vector: (CVSS:3.1/AV:N/AC:H/PR:N/UI:N/S:U/C:L/I:L/A:N).
